sql_array: CREATE TYPE "ISOAPServiceType" AS (debug INT DEFAULT 0, url VARCHAR DEFAULT 'http://example.com/soap', request VARCHAR, response VARCHAR);
CREATE PROCEDURE "TestService"() { DECLARE svc "ISOAPServiceType"; DECLARE res NVARCHAR; svc := new "ISOAPServiceType"(); svc.url := 'http://example.com/soap'; }
UPDATE "ISOAPServiceType" SET response = 'Updated response' WHERE url = 'http://example.com/soap';
